ddls:
CREATE TABLE "space_objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each space object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the space object */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of space object (e.g., satellite, asteroid, planet) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the space object */,
  "discovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the space object was discovered */,
  "discovery_location" TEXT /* Location or observatory where the space object was discovered */,
  "mass" TEXT /* Mass of the space object in kilograms */,
  "diameter" TEXT /* Diameter of the space object in kilometers (if applicable) */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Composition of the space object (e.g., rocky, metallic, gaseous) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the space object (e.g., active, decommissioned, lost) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orbital_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orbital parameter */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the space object the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the orbital parameter (e.g., eccentricity, rate of right ascension) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the orbital parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the orbital parameter (e.g., radians, degrees) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the orbital parameter data (e.g., ground station, space-based telescope) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the parameter was updated */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the parameter value (1-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orbital_parameters_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES space_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellite_parameters" (
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite parameter set */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the satellite the parameters belong to */,
  "argument_of_perigee" TEXT /* Argument of perigee (radians) */,
  "mean_anomaly" TEXT /* Mean anomaly of reference time (radians) */,
  "binary_offset" INTEGER /* Binary offset (bytes) */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the satellite was launched */,
  "launch_vehicle" TEXT /* Vehicle used to launch the satellite */,
  "mission_duration" INTEGER /* Expected mission duration in days */,
  "orbital_period" TEXT /* Orbital period of the satellite in minutes */,
  "apogee" TEXT /* Apogee of the satellite's orbit in kilometers */,
  "perigee" TEXT /* Perigee of the satellite's orbit in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satellite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_parameters_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES space_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asteroid_parameters" (
  "asteroid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asteroid parameter set */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asteroid the parameters belong to */,
  "orbital_inclination" TEXT /* Orbital inclination (degrees) */,
  "longitude_of_ascending_node" TEXT /* Longitude of the ascending node (degrees) */,
  "mean_motion" TEXT /* Mean motion of the asteroid in degrees per day */,
  "eccentricity" TEXT /* Eccentricity of the asteroid's orbit */,
  "period" TEXT /* Orbital period of the asteroid in years */,
  "semi_major_axis" TEXT /* Semi-major axis of the asteroid's orbit in astronomical units (AU) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asteroid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asteroid_parameters_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES space_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team or department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string detailing the user's specific permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the space object being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the space object */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the space object was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Specific data or parameters accessed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES space_objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
